meta.title: Server vs Client Components
meta.excerpt: Understanding the differences between server and client components in Next.js and when to use each.

seo.metaTitle: Server vs Client Components | App Reference
seo.metaDescription: Learn when to use server vs client components in Next.js applications.

props.text: Next.js defaults to server components for performance, with opt-in client components for interactivity.

props.body:
Execute on server only
• Direct data access
• Keep secrets secure
• Better SEO
• Reduced JavaScript

Interactivity
• Event handlers
• State hooks
• Browser APIs
• Context providers

props.title: Use Client Directive
props.body: Mark a component with 'use client' at the top of the file to opt into client-side rendering and enable interactivity.

props.text: Choose server components by default for better performance. Use client components only when you need interactivity or browser APIs.

features.title: Use Server For
features.description: Data fetching, API calls, database access, large dependencies

features.title: Use Client For
features.description: Event handlers, useState, useEffect, browser APIs

features.title: Hybrid Approach
features.description: Server component wrapping client components for data

features.title: Performance
features.description: Server components reduce JavaScript bundle size

props.title: Decision Matrix
Default to Server
props.body: Always start with server components and only add 'use client' when you encounter an error or need interactivity.

props.text: Compose server and client components effectively to maximize performance while maintaining interactivity.

links.title: Server Wrapper Pattern
links.description: Server component fetches data and passes to client component as props

links.title: Children Composition
links.description: Pass server components as children to client components

links.title: Shared Components
links.description: Pure presentational components can be used in both contexts

props.title: Server Wrapper Pattern Example
Best Practice
props.body: Keep client components small and focused. Let server components handle data fetching and pass serializable props to client components.
